titleStmt.title: SII 31.59: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 59. (A.R. No. B 336 of 1936.) HAMPI, KAMALAPUR TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT, KARNATAKA.

summary.p: On the Pedestal of stone image kept in the Courtyard of the Archeaological Museum.

This inscription is dated in the Cyclic year Bhāva, Phālguṇa, ba. 1 (pratipādi) This can be assigned to the 14th century on the basis of palaeography and internal evidences. Hence the date corresponds to 1395 A.D., 8th March.

Refers to the construction of a Chaityālaya at the city of Kandanavrōlu and the conscration of the image of Kuṁthutīthanakara there in by Immaḍi Bukka Mantrīśvara son of Baichaya Daṇḍanāth, who was a disciple of Śrī Dharmmabhūshaṇa Bhaṭṭārakachāryya of the Mūlasaṅgha, Balātkāra-gaṇa and Saraswatī gachha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakava¨rṣē va¨rttamānēbhāva saṁvatsarē phālguṇamāsē kṛṣṇapakṣē pratipadi sōmavā
rē śrīmūlasaṁgha balātkāragaṇasarasvatīgacchē śrīdha¨rmma bhūṣaṇa bhaṭṭārakā cā¨ryya va¨ryyapriya
śiṣyēṇa śrībaicayadaṁḍanādhapriya kumārēṇa Ananyajanya saujanya pāṁcajanya kṣīra sā
garēṇa yiṁmaḍi bukkamaṁtrīśvarēṇa kaṁdanavrōlinaga¨ryyāṁ caityālayaṁ kārayitvā tatra
śrīkuṁdhutī¨rttakarapratimā pratiṣṭākārī siva(śubha)mastu sa¨rvvajagati .
Digital edition of SII 31.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
